seed_problem: Select a maximum-weight set of mutually non-conflicting research sites on a general conflict graph; checker validates independence and scores weight/baseline.
mutation: input: generalize the conflict structure from a bipartite/structured graph to an arbitrary general graph with planted conflict cliques and heavy-tailed vertex values, so maximum-weight independent set is NP-hard and weight-greedy / weight-over-degree / local-search-swap strategies diverge.
title: The Curator's Dilemma: Conflict-Free Gallery Tour
strategies: index-order greedy baseline: scan installations 1..n and add each one whenever it conflicts with none already chosen (ignores value)
weight-greedy: sort installations by value descending, add each if it conflicts with none already chosen
weight-over-degree greedy: sort by value/(1+degree) descending to favour high-value, low-conflict installations
local-search swap improvement: from a weighted-greedy start, repeatedly add a vertex and evict the lighter conflicting chosen neighbours whenever that yields a net value gain
